audit_items.proof_trace: Memory allocated at L6089 is never freed when portnumber_file is NULL and either server_sockets() call fails (L6113 or L6132 exit paths), bypassing cleanup code at L6139-6140.
audit_items.attack_scenario: Set MEMCACHED_PORT_FILENAME to trigger allocation, cause fopen() failure (portnumber_file=NULL), then trigger socket creation failure to hit exit() without cleanup.
